package rulecoverage

func NegativeMigrationRunnerAndApiServerBootstrapCoupled() string {
    ruleID := "migration_runner_and_api_server_bootstrap_coupled"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "One startup path that always runs migrations and serves traffic together."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
